title: Issue-specific information releases - Ministry of Education
content:
Ngā tukunga pārongo e hāngai pū ana ki ētahi take

## Issue-specific information releases
Find out about the topics we have released packages of information about, where there is a high degree of public interest.
- Legal and compliance 1
- Policies and regulations 1
- Whakapuaki mōhiohio mō te hōtaka Healthy School Lunches Healthy School Lunches information releases The following Ministry of Education documents have been released in relation to Healthy School Lunches.
The following Ministry of Education documents have been released in relation to Healthy School Lunches.
- Te Mātauranga Pouako Tauhou Initial Teacher Education We commenced targeted stakeholder consultation on Friday 30 August on a government proposal to make changes to the way standard setting and approvals of Initial Teacher Education are undertaken.
We commenced targeted stakeholder consultation on Friday 30 August on a government proposal to make changes to the way standard setting and approvals of Initial Teacher Education are undertaken.
- Mahere Mahi mō te Hāpai Ako me te tuari i te mahi Kairuruku Learning Support Action Plan and Coordinator role allocation These papers relate to the release of the draft Disability and Learning Support Action Plan, the engagement process and the outcome of that engagement.
These papers relate to the release of the draft Disability and Learning Support Action Plan, the engagement process and the outcome of that engagement.
- Te whakanohotahi i ngā kura o Marlborough Marlborough Schools Co-location The project to co-locate Marlborough’s Boys’ and Girls’ Colleges and relocate Bohally Intermediate School (Te Tātoru o Wairau) was first approved in 2015.
The project to co-locate Marlborough’s Boys’ and Girls’ Colleges and relocate Bohally Intermediate School (Te Tātoru o Wairau) was first approved in 2015.
- Tō te Tāhūhū o te Mātauranga hōtaka pūtea penapena Ministry of Education’s savings programme In response to the Government’s savings requirements, the Ministry of Education has been identifying ways to achieve these savings.
In response to the Government’s savings requirements, the Ministry of Education has been identifying ways to achieve these savings.
- Kaupae | Tūārere 5 kaupapa Marautanga Phase | Tūārere 5 Curriculum subjects Documents related to the development and release of Phase 5 (Years | Tau 11-13) curriculum subjects.
Documents related to the development and release of Phase 5 (Years | Tau 11-13) curriculum subjects.
- Ngā waeture mō ngā hāora tūwhera o ngā kura School opening hours regulations On 1 January 2023, the new Education (When State Schools Must Be Open) Regulations 2022 came into force.
On 1 January 2023, the new Education (When State Schools Must Be Open) Regulations 2022 came into force.
- Ngā kura whakaururu karauna State-integrated schools Information about state-integrated schools, and published integration agreements, including supplementary agreements, for current state-integrated schools.
Information about state-integrated schools, and published integration agreements, including supplementary agreements, for current state-integrated schools.
- Te Wānanga o Raukawa: Whakahau ā-Kaunihera Te Wānanga o Raukawa: Order in Council The Education and Training Amendment Act 2023 established the Wānanga enabling framework.
The Education and Training Amendment Act 2023 established the Wānanga enabling framework.
- Te Arotake i ngā Matea Taumatua The Highest Needs Review These key documents offer background information on the Highest Needs Review.
These key documents offer background information on the Highest Needs Review.
- Te Tauākī o ngā Whakaarotau Ako me te Mātauranga ā-Motu The Statement of National Education and Learning Priorities The Statement of National Education and Learning Priorities (NELP) and the Tertiary Education Strategy (TES) set out the Government's priorities for education.
The Statement of National Education and Learning Priorities (NELP) and the Tertiary Education Strategy (TES) set out the Government's priorities for education.
- Te whāki whakaaetanga kore o tā te Tāhūhū o te Mātauranga pūrongo mahere pūtea Unauthorised disclosure of Ministry of Education budget report A summary of the findings of an investigation into the unauthorised disclosure of the Ministry of Education budget report in May 2025.
A summary of the findings of an investigation into the unauthorised disclosure of the Ministry of Education budget report in May 2025.
